pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 6 (rm -f) and export_result.sh line 147 (json.dump) both reference this exact path

privileged_info_summary: The control_point_failure_message_audit task operates on Odoo 17 Quality module. The task involves 5 Quality Control Points (quality.point model) with specific names and pre-filled failure messages on 2 of them. The task requires adding failure messages (minimum 10 characters) to 3 target QCPs (Incoming Parts Verification, Screen Dimensional Inspection, Desk Surface Flatness Check) and creating a new Measure-type QCP for the Customizable Desk product. Verification scoring uses multi-criterion evaluation: 40 points for filling all 3 target QCP messages, 35 points for creating the correct Measure-type QCP, and 25 points for adding a failure message to the new QCP. Pass threshold is 60 points. Result verification data is written to /tmp/control_point_failure_message_audit_result.json.
